content.text: I'll start by diagnosing the current state of all resources across the three namespaces.

kubectl get all -n spark-team-a

echo ""

echo ""
echo "=== History Server ==="
kubectl get all -n spark-history
echo ""

kubectl get rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a -o yaml

content.text: Confirmed all three issues. Both SparkPi jobs are currently running (not failed yet), and the History Server pod is Pending due to the PVC issue. Let me check the PVC and deployment spec before applying fixes.

input.command:
echo "=== PVCs in spark-history ==="
kubectl get pvc -n spark-history
echo ""
echo "=== History server deployment volumes ==="
kubectl get deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history -o yaml

content.content:
=== PVCs in spark-history ===
NAME                STATUS    VOLUME   CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   VOLUMEATTRIBUTESCLASS   AGE
spark-history-pvc   Pending                                      standard       <unset>                 70s

=== History server deployment volumes ===
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-history-server","namespace":"spark-history"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-history-server"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-history-server"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/opt/spark/bin/spark-class","org.apache.spark.deploy.history.HistoryServer"],"env":[{"name":"SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS","value":"-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/wrong/path/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"},{"name":"SPARK_NO_DAEMONIZE","value":"true"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-history-server","ports":[{"containerPort":18080,"name":"http"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"100m","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/mnt/spark-logs","name":"spark-logs"}]}],"serviceAccountName":"spark","volumes":[{"name":"spark-logs","persistentVolumeClaim":{"claimName":"spark-history-pvc-wrong"}}]}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T01:39:35Z"
  generation: 1
  name: spark-history-server
  namespace: spark-history
  resourceVersion: "2828242"
  uid: 71d13daa-cf3e-4ad2-8372-2dbd0333f709
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-history-server
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-history-server
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /opt/spark/bin/spark-class
        - org.apache.spark.deploy.history.HistoryServer
        env:
        - name: SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS
          value: -Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/wrong/path/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s
            -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080
        - name: SPARK_NO_DAEMONIZE
          value: "true"
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-history-server
        ports:
        - containerPort: 18080
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /mnt/spark-logs
          name: spark-logs
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark
      serviceAccountName: spark
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: spark-logs
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: spark-history-pvc-wrong
status:
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T01:39:38Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-10T01:39:38Z"
    message: Deployment does not have minimum availability.
    reason: MinimumReplicasUnavailable
    status: "False"
    type: Available
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T01:39:36Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-10T01:39:40Z"
    message: ReplicaSet "spark-history-server-748fd9b7f7" is progressing.
    reason: ReplicaSetUpdated
    status: "True"
    type: Progressing
  observedGeneration: 1
  replicas: 1
  unavailableReplicas: 1
  updatedReplicas: 1

content.text: All confirmed. Now applying the three fixes via kubectl patch/set env (no YAML edits).

input.command:
kubectl patch rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/subjects/0/namespace", "value": "spark-team-a"}]'

kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]'

kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"

description:
kubectl patch rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/subjects/0/namespace", "value": "spark-team-a"}]'

kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]'

kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"

summary:
kubectl patch rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/subjects/0/namespace", "value": "spark-team-a"}]'

kubectl patch deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/volumes/0/persistentVolumeClaim/claimName", "value": "spark-history-pvc"}]'

kubectl set env deployment/spark-history-server -n spark-history \
  SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS="-Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080"

content.content:
rolebinding.rbac.authorization.k8s.io/spark-role-binding patched
deployment.apps/spark-history-server patched
deployment.apps/spark-history-server env updated

tool_use_result.stdout:
rolebinding.rbac.authorization.k8s.io/spark-role-binding patched
deployment.apps/spark-history-server patched
deployment.apps/spark-history-server env updated

input.command:
kubectl get rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a -o jsonpath='{.subjects[0].namespace}'; echo
echo "=== History server rollout ==="
kubectl rollout status deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history --timeout=90s
